title: Unified stack-* skills + dev-up/dev-down (hard-renamed). One coherent stack-operations skill set that works on any stack (dev-N|demo-N), with the dev lifecycle mirroring demo's. dev-up consolidates the former setup-platform + start-platform into one dev bring-up that drives the M13 set-dress flow; dev-down is net-new. The 4 ops skills are hard-renamed (no aliases): stack-list (<-demo-status), stack-seed (<-demo-seed), stack-snapshot (<-demo-snapshot), stack-update (<-update-platform), each accepting a dev-N|demo-N target. The 6 old skill dirs are removed. Full reference sweep: CLAUDE.md skill table rewritten, READMEs, corpus/ops/ guides + demo/ recipes, CHANGELOG; demo-up/demo-down retained + aligned with the dev lifecycle.
kind: a rename/consolidation + reference-sweep milestone — the deliverable is the converged skill SKILL.md set + the corpus reference integrity, not new production code. No new Go/Python/TS production path in rosetta. The one new test is a reference-integrity guard in the extensions clone (TestDocSourceSkillRename_M14). The headline is the contract/reference integrity (rename invariant, CLAUDE.md bijection, skill->CLI contract), not new test counts.

tests.language: markdown (skills + corpus — the deliverable) + go (extensions reference-integrity guard) + python (dev-stack pytest, unchanged) + shellcheck/py_compile
tests.go_note: stack-snapshot 223 -> 224 (+1: TestDocSourceSkillRename_M14 — asserts .claude/skills/stack-snapshot/SKILL.md exists + the retired demo-snapshot dir stays gone; skips gracefully when the sibling rosetta repo isn't reachable). alignment + clerkenstein + stack-seeding unchanged. Go total 720 -> 721 (+1).

python_unchanged.note: M14 touched no Python production surface; 174 passed (dev-stack 38 unchanged from M13).

tests.race: all 4 Go modules pass -race -count=1 (alignment, clerkenstein, stack-seeding 8 pkgs, stack-snapshot 12 pkgs all ok)
tests.gofmt_vet: gofmt -l empty + go vet clean on all modules
tests.flake_gate: 5/5 clean — stack-snapshot {cmd/stackscap (the rename-guard package) + full module} 5x -count=1 -shuffle=on, all PASS. 0 flakes.

coverage.note: harden ran 1 pass (recorded in progress.md). M14 is a rename/docs milestone — the milestone-touched rosetta surface is entirely markdown (renamed/consolidated SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md table, corpus/ops guides + demo recipes, plan records). No code-coverage surface in rosetta. The one code change is the extensions-clone reference-integrity test guard.
coverage.reference_integrity: the 4 dimensions verified clean at close (independently of the harden record): (1) hard-rename invariant — 0 live stragglers project-wide, every retired-name mention is a provenance marker; (2) CLAUDE.md table <-> 14 skill dirs perfect bijection; (3) SKILL.md name: frontmatter <-> dir name 0 mismatches; (4) skill->CLI contract — every driven binary (dev-stack, stackseed, stacksnap, provision-plan, stack_registry.py, rosetta-demo) resolves in the extensions clone.
coverage.doc_links: all ../-relative .md links in the new/renamed skill SKILL.md files resolve to real targets; 0 broken links to deleted skill dirs.

delivered.dev_up: .claude/skills/dev-up/ (SKILL.md + reference.md) — consolidates the former setup-platform + start-platform into one dev bring-up; drives the M13 set-dress flow (per-stack Directus + auto-snapshot + dev-min seed). dev-up N (N>=1) spins additional isolated dev-N. Element-by-element diff against the former setup+start bodies: no dropped step (STEP RUN, confirmation policy, ops reports, TodoWrite progress, 12-container set, error recovery). (M14-D2)
delivered.stack_list: .claude/skills/stack-list/SKILL.md (<-demo-status) — the unified live-stacks view (dev-N + demo-N) via rosetta-demo status + stack_registry.py.
delivered.stack_seed: .claude/skills/stack-seed/SKILL.md (<-demo-seed) — seeds dev-N|demo-N via stackseed --stack. --preset NAME is a skill-level shorthand mapped to --seed presets/NAME.seed.yaml (M14-D5, the PR-review fix); 4 presets (dev-min/small-200/mid-500/large-1k) exist.
delivered.stack_snapshot: .claude/skills/stack-snapshot/SKILL.md (<-demo-snapshot) — replays the public taxonomy+directus into dev-N|demo-N via stacksnap. The skill namespace is distinct from the stack-snapshot extensions SECTION name (called out in the body to avoid collision).
delivered.stack_update: .claude/skills/stack-update/SKILL.md (+ reference.md) (<-update-platform) — syncs a stack (main dev N=0 or a named dev-N) via make pull/migrate/up.
delivered.old_dirs_removed: 6 dirs removed (hard rename, no shims): setup-platform, start-platform, update-platform, demo-status, demo-seed, demo-snapshot.
delivered.reference_sweep: CLAUDE.md skill table rewritten (14-skill set); root + corpus READMEs; corpus/ops/ guides (setup/run/update/demo) + the demo/ recipe family; CHANGELOG (new Unreleased v1.3 Added/Changed/Removed, v1.1/v1.2 dated entries left immutable — M14-D6). demo-up/demo-down retained + aligned with the dev lifecycle.
delivered.extensions_doc_sweep: 4 extension-clone references updated on main (b37e831): dev-stack header + README, demo-stack GUIDE, stack-verify run.sh — doc/comment-only, no CLI/section-name change.

extensions.module: rosetta-extensions — doc-only reference sweep (dev-stack header/README, demo-stack GUIDE, stack-verify run.sh) + the harden reference-integrity guard (stack-snapshot/cmd/stacksnap/main_drift_test.go: comments re-pointed /demo-snapshot -> /stack-snapshot + new TestDocSourceSkillRename_M14).

review.adversarial: Phase 2c for a docs/rename milestone = reference-integrity adversarial probes (recorded in progress.md harden section): re-appearing a retired skill dir fails the new guard (negative-tested); a renamed skill driving a non-existent CLI flag would break the skill->CLI contract check (all resolve). 0 bugs surfaced; no documented-risk acceptance needed.

completeness_ledger.done_fate1: all 5 sections (dev-up consolidation + dev-down; the 4 hard-renames stack-list/seed/snapshot/update with dev-N|demo-N targets; the 6 old-dir removals; the full reference sweep across CLAUDE.md + READMEs + corpus/ops guides + demo recipes + CHANGELOG; demo-up/demo-down retained + aligned). completeness_ledger.confirmed_covered_fate2: the safety & security doc + dual-repo KB refresh -> M15 (M15 In: list owns corpus/ops/safety.md + the rosetta-extensions/knowledge/ refresh).

notes: M14 converges the operation skills onto both stack kinds via a hard rename (no aliases — the user accepted the clean-break tradeoff; the blast radius was contained by sweeping every in-repo reference). The defining shape: this is a docs/reference-integrity milestone, so the quality bar is the contract (rename invariant, CLAUDE.md<->dirs bijection, skill->CLI resolution) rather than new test counts. The one new test (TestDocSourceSkillRename_M14) turns the silent-comment-rot / dir-resurrection failure mode into a test failure. The skill SKILL.md namespace stack-snapshot is deliberately distinct from the extensions SECTION stack-snapshot/ (the skill drives the stacksnap CLI that section builds) — called out in the body to avoid conceptual collision. Next: M15 (safety & security doc + dual-repo KB refresh — the LAST v1.3 milestone) -> /developer-kit:close-release.
